{{Quote|Now listen up, Morti, and listen good! I meant what I told you when I took you on as my agent—I don't work freak shows!|Shirley, to Morti|<ref name="marvel77" />}}
'''Morti''' was the talent agent for [[Shirley]], the [[Chanteuse of the Stars/Legends|Chanteuse of the Stars]], a popular singer during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Shirley refused to perform at a diplomatic summit on [[Kabray Station]], throwing Morti into a panic. Morti later mistook [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leader [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who had disguised herself as Shirley to evade pursuit from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], for the "Chanteuse" and ushered her out on stage to perform in her stead.<ref name="marvel77" />
